item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Wait for it
item.description: An Alaskan guide was filming a survival video in Juneau, Alaska, for her 170,000 TikTok followers when she suddenly heard a landslide heading toward her. The woman, who goes by the Dirty Explorer (@thedirtyexplorer) on TikTok, stopped filming her video and looked up, terrified, when she heard a landslide approaching. She quickly picked up her phone and kept recording as she ran as fast as she could away from her filming spot. At one point, according to the text overlay, she thinks the landslide is either stopping or slowing down, but viewers can hear the sudden increase in sound that indicates the main slide is just beginning.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Man, this is me.
item.description: This account cracks me up. Once again I feel called out. Diagnosed with ADHD almost 20 years ago (see some of my other posts for additional relatable stuff) and it’s funny hearing someone say something that’s validating. Whoa. Viral edit: the world is a crazy place right now. Most of it is beyond our control. Here are two cheap and simple things that can get us on the right track: - Be kind to people. We’re all fighting some kind of fight. - Wash your hands and cover your mouth when you cough. Wear a mask if you have any symptoms. We’re not out of the woods yet. A new strain could be right around the corner. - Enjoy every day. Treat yourself to nice things and let your loved ones know they’re loved. - If you have a pet, give ‘em some love. You’re aware of the whole world. To them, you’re their world.
item.dc:creator: CloakedFigure25

item.title: It's My Cake Day...
item.description: ... so I'm sharing some cosplay cake... Been here 8 years now - and have only grown to love this community more and more!! Thank you for letting me share my art and my hobby :D My Mara Jade cosplay here is still one of my favs!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: It's nice to be wanted
item.description: Ever since the pandemic hit I haven't been involved in singing at all. I had already resigned from My previous bands and haven't been doing much of anything in the music scenes for the past couple of years. I haven't even been to any karaoke bars for obvious reasons. Out of nowhere this guy contacts me on Facebook asking me to do background vocals on their new album. I listen to their stuff and it's REALLY good! I asked him how he decided to contact me of all people and he told me he saw me in the Voice of Finland years ago (I dropped out in the battles). Surprised to see people still consider me a viable singer. I thought my music career/self-paying hobby was over and it was time to move on!
item.dc:creator: Hairysteed

item.title: Oh no! I better click the blue button! Amazon Phishing Emails
item.description: I received both of these emails within thirty minutes last night. I better go change my secret phrase since my account has been incapacitated on my contraption! Apparently, I also have a career in costume design. The icing on the cake was the mishmash of languages and places in the address lines at the bottom.
item.dc:creator: DBWhatever

item.title: Small... but fierce! (OC)
item.description:
Even demons need a cuddle!
Thank you for reading my comic! I hope you liked it! Edit: Thank you for all the love! I only just started drawing comics but if you want to see more you can find me on Twitter and Instagram! https://twitter.com/hellcritters https://instagram.com/hellcritters
